name: Alert
description: Alert schema from Pure1 Public REST API

allOf.description: A built-in resource that exists on one or multiple arrays.

actual.description: Actual condition at the time of the alert.

category.description:
Category of the alert. Valid values are `array`, `hardware`, and
`software`.

closed.description: Time when the alert was closed, in milliseconds since UNIX epoch.

component_name.description: Name of the component alerted about.

component_type.description: Type of the component alerted about.

created.description: Time when the alert was created, in milliseconds since UNIX epoch.

knowledge_base_url.description: URL of the relevant Knowledge Base page.

notified.description:
Time when the user was notified of the alert, in milliseconds since
UNIX epoch.

origin.description: Origin of the alert. Valid values are `array` and `Pure1`.

severity.description:
Current severity level. Valid values are `info`, `warning`, `critical`,
and `hidden`.

state.description:
Current state of the alert. Valid values are `open`, `closing`,
and `closed`.

updated.description: Time when the alert was last updated, in milliseconds since UNIX epoch.
